mapper.select: select id, report_code, report_name, table_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, org_code, org_name, del_flag, status from tb_report_def where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_report_def(report_code, report_name, table_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, org_code, org_name, del_flag, status) values (#{reportCode}, #{reportName}, #{tableName}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{delFlag}, #{status})

insert into tb_report_def(report_code, report_name, table_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, org_code, org_name, del_flag, status) values
(#{entity.reportCode}, #{entity.reportName}, #{entity.tableName}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.orgCode}, #{entity.orgName}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.status})

insert into tb_report_def(report_code, report_name, table_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, org_code, org_name, del_flag, status) values
(#{item.reportCode}, #{item.reportName}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.orgCode}, #{item.orgName}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.status})

insert into tb_report_def(report_code, report_name, table_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, org_code, org_name, del_flag, status) values
(#{entity.reportCode}, #{entity.reportName}, #{entity.tableName}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.orgCode}, #{entity.orgName}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update report_code = values(report_code), report_name = values(report_name), table_name = values(table_name), create_by = values(create_by), create_time = values(create_time), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time), org_code = values(org_code), org_name = values(org_name), del_flag = values(del_flag), status = values(status)
mapper.update:
update tb_report_def
report_code = #{reportCode},
report_name = #{reportName},
table_name = #{tableName},
create_by = #{createBy},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
org_code = #{orgCode},
org_name = #{orgName},
del_flag = #{delFlag},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
